ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name */,
  "payment_per_year" INTEGER /* Number of dividend payments per year */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  "yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "announced" TEXT /* Date the dividend was announced */,
  "record" TEXT /* Date the dividend is recorded */,
  "payable" TEXT /* Date the dividend is payable */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the dividend is paid */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year to which the dividend pertains */,
  "dividend_type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., regular, special) */,
  "is_adjusted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dividend has been adjusted for splits or other corporate actions */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dividend data (e.g., company announcement, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker", "ex_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Company's contact phone number */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the company is publicly traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the sector in the overall market index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sector information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "weight_in_sector" REAL /* Weight of the industry within its sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the given date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient for the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "market_index" TEXT /* Market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Value of the market index */,
  "market_change" REAL /* Change in the market index value */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the market index on the given date */,
  "high_value" REAL /* Highest value of the market index on the given date */,
  "low_value" REAL /* Lowest value of the market index on the given date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "market_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* Value of the user's investment portfolio */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for the user's portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the alert */,
  "dividend_threshold" REAL /* Dividend threshold for the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., dividend, price threshold) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol in the portfolio */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price per share */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the portfolio entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was issued */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., internal analyst, external provider) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the recommendation is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "market_index" TEXT /* Market index analyzed */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Identified trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "analysis_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the prediction */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Predicted date for the dividend */,
  "predicted_dividend" REAL /* Predicted dividend amount */,
  "predicted_yield" REAL /* Predicted dividend yield */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., internal model, external provider) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
